_publications._publicationTitle: Systems Biology Approaches Reveal Potential Phenotype-Modifier Genes in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: In ClinVar, germline variants were reported for all genes (N = 5216), with the exception of SDC2. Almost half (46.4%) of them were submitted as variants of uncertain significance (VUS).
details: Reported germline variants for all candidate genes except SDC2 (N=5216 total), with 46.4% classified as variants of uncertain significance
